reviews.comment:
Un poco desorganizado para pedir café con medialunas o café con un sándwich de lomito que una cosa es una ventanilla, otra en otra se pagan y  otra y al final terminamos 0como un trompo ‼️
lo demás todo bien la gente muy amable Con una limpiaño y ordenado

(Translated by Google)
A bit disorganized when ordering coffee with croissants or coffee with a steak sandwich. One window is different from another, and you pay at yet another, and in the end we were completely lost! ‼️
Otherwise everything was fine, the people were very friendly, and the place was clean and tidy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBdG83SFNREAE

reviews.comment:
Hice una breve parada en esta estación, los baños pulcros en su totalidad, iluminados, con jabón líquido, secamanos y todo lo que uno puede llegar a necesitar en ellos, espacio arbolado , fresco , para descansar y reponer energías, el personal encargado del expendio de combustibles , súper amables , correctos , si UD está volviendo por la ruta 2  , no dude en efectuar una parada por el acá de dolores

(Translated by Google)
I made a brief stop at this station. The restrooms were spotless, well-lit, and equipped with liquid soap, hand dryers, and everything else one could possibly need. There's a cool, shady area nearby, perfect for resting and recharging. The staff at the pump were incredibly friendly and helpful. If you're traveling back along Route 2, don't hesitate to stop here in Dolores.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBcFB5VEdBEAE
